497 P1BDA P1BDA_RES_THPY_DAY (P1BDA) Respiratory Therapy Days CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: special treatments, procedures, and programs - therapies - respiratory therapy - number of days for 15 minutes or more (last 7 days).
